case_metadata.title: Arcane Ley Failure
case_metadata.summary: Ley flow is failing across the arcology. The ward council must keep waterworks, lift towers, and district heat functioning while preserving confidence in civic magic.
case_metadata.player_role: You are coordinating the ward council's emergency response.
case_metadata.goal_text: Goal: keep Highspire stable long enough to prevent cascading magical failure.
reference_notes: This is a parity/reference fantasy scenario for ontology binding tests.
It proves that the same canonical systems can render through magical mechanism language without engine changes.

actors.agenda: Prevent citywide magical collapse while preserving confidence in council rule.
Protect the ley network without exhausting crews and reserves.

groups.main_pressure: repair fatigue and unstable ley channels

teaching_signals.guidance: This scenario asks you to translate a fantasy setting into the same systems reasoning you would use in a historical or modern crisis.

historical_notes.provenance: Created to test canonical ontology portability across settings.
